message.content:
(1) The image contains a **combination of an icon and a logo**: a stylized crescent moon with a play button (triangle) inside, topped by a small diamond shape.  
(2) No visible text.  
(3) Colors: Background = light gray (#E5E5E5), Foreground (icon) = white (#FFFFFF).  
(4) Background is **colored** (light gray).  
(5) Visual style: **Modern/minimal** (clean lines, simple geometric shapes).  
(6) Content has **padding/margin** around it (the icon is centered with space on all sides).  
(7) Focal point is the **center** of the frame.  
(8) Yes, it would work well as a small top-center watermark: the minimal design is unobtrusive, the high-contrast white icon stands out against most video backgrounds, and its central composition fits the top-center placement naturally.
